narrative:
North Olmsted-01-E (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,013 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.7%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.8 percentage points.
